title: sarcococca saligna var. coriacea
intro: Sarcococca saligna var. coriacea, also known as Sweet Box, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Buxaceae. This evergreen shrub is native to China and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sarcococca saligna var. coriacea include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Sarcococca saligna var. coriacea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of conditions.
